name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-primitive-surface-gate1
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for RVV low-precision contraction primitives; Gates 1-3 are complete and Gate 4 is active for Gearbox/resource-aware selected-body realization plus measured same-target comparison.
creator: codex
notes: Gates 1-3 are complete. Gate 4 primitive source/load/extension, widening-product role/policy facts, selected-dispatch no-win denial, packed-i4 low-shifted-product-rescale repair, evidence-root policy ingestion, resource-cost/admission decision consumption, and this high-nibble vwmacc schedule/resource repair now flow through Gearbox resource admission, selected-body realization/admission handoff, route metadata, target artifact mirrors, generated-bundle checks, same-target measurement records, production-pressure policy inputs, selected-dispatch policy evaluation, and direct measurement-outcome policy consumption. The current packed-i4 resource-cost contract is rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-resource-cost-contract.v1 with model high-nibble-vwmacc-loop-11-peak-live-5of32-two-region-vsetvl.v1, loop-body steps 11, peak live vector groups 5/32, blocker packed-i4-high-nibble-vwmacc-loop-11-budget-5of32-no-win, and no-win admission decision deny-performance-preferred-with-resource-cost-no-win-blocker. Fresh ssh rvv timing after the production schedule repair reports no-win evidence: dequant 0.896848..1.020953 with 12 summaries / 60 measurements / 12 correctness records, and dequant-clamp 0.867416..1.043671 with 24 summaries / 120 measurements / 24 correctness records. Route support and correctness execution remain allowed through correctness-fallback; performance-preferred remains denied unless a later provider-owned repair produces source-backed measured-win evidence and updates maturity, target mirrors, measurement roots, resource-cost admission, and policy facts. Macro remains active for the next Gate 4 schedule/resource bottleneck beyond the high-nibble vwmacc 11-step/5-of-32 contract, or an explicit production-consumed blocker.
